title: dryopteris thelypteris var. pubescens
intro: Dryopteris thelypteris var. pubescens, also known as the pubescent shield fern, is a variety of the Dryopteris thelypteris plant, which belongs to the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dryopteris thelypteris var. pubescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
